semantic_info.description: The data originates from the ETTh1 dataset, likely focused on monitoring electricity transformer temperatures over time. It contains 17,420 hourly records across seven key measurements. The dataset exhibits non-stationary behavior as the Augmented Dickey-Fuller test suggests a lack of stationarity with a p-value of 0.1319. There are no missing values, indicating consistent data collection. The data shows no strong trend or seasonality, supported by a low trend linearity (R2 = 0.39) and weak seasonality strength. High autocorrelation at lag 1 (0.99) suggests persistence in the data but with subtle changes over time, making prediction challenging.
